component.name: Gratonite Server
component.summary: Self-host your own Gratonite chat instance

description.p: Gratonite Server lets you run your own Gratonite chat instance with one click. It manages Docker containers for you — no terminal or server knowledge required.

ul.li: One-click setup — just launch the app and your instance is running
Full Gratonite with chat, voice, video, threads, and more
Automatic federation — connect with other Gratonite instances
System tray integration for background operation
Auto-updates for both the app and server images
